changeSet.author: ADMIN (generated)
changeSet.sql: delete from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map where scope_id in (select id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope where uri_pattern IN ( 'get:/api/v1/brokerChat/brokerProfile/{brokerId}', 'get:/api/v1/brokerChat/brokerProfile', 'get:/api/v1/brokerChat/chatRooms', 'get:/api/v1/brokerChat/chatRooms/{chatRoomId}', 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/currentPortfolio', 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/historicalPortfolio', 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/historicalPortfolio/allStocks', 'post:/api/v1/copyTrading/subscriber/subscribe', 'delete:/api/v1/copyTrading/subscriber/subscribe', 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/subscriber/subscriberInformation' ));

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map(scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/brokerChat/brokerProfile/{brokerId}' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/brokerChat/brokerProfile' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/brokerChat/chatRooms' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/brokerChat/chatRooms/{chatRoomId}' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/currentPortfolio' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/historicalPortfolio' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/historicalPortfolio/allStocks' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'post:/api/v1/copyTrading/subscriber/subscribe' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'delete:/api/v1/copyTrading/subscriber/subscribe' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/subscriber/subscriberInformation' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API';
